faq.title: Common
faq.description: Quick answers to questions you might have.

pricing.question: How much does a typical project cost?
pricing.answer: Consulting starts at €500. Full platforms typically range from €5,000 to €25,000 depending on scope. We provide a detailed quote after understanding your needs.

tools.question: What technologies do you work with?
tools.answer: Our primary stack is Next.js, React, TypeScript, and PostgreSQL. We also work with Supabase, Prisma, and various APIs. We pick the right tool for the job.

timeline.question: How long does a project take?
timeline.answer: A consulting engagement takes 1-2 weeks. A typical web application takes 4-12 weeks depending on complexity. We provide realistic timelines upfront. No surprises.

remote.question: Do you work with clients outside France?
remote.answer: Yes. We work remotely with clients across Europe and beyond. Communication happens via video calls, email, and your preferred project management tools. Fully bilingual in English and French.

support.question: Do you offer ongoing support after launch?
support.answer: Yes. We offer maintenance packages that include bug fixes, updates, monitoring, and feature additions. Most clients choose ongoing support. We don't disappear after delivery.

cta.title: Book a call. We map your system and show what to fix.
cta.description: No proposal, no commitment unless it makes sense.
cta.note: One free call. I will tell you exactly what I would build and why.

socialProof.title: Trusted by
socialProof.description: From startups to established companies, I deliver systems that drive results.

testimonial1.quote: Deralis built our entire SaaS platform from scratch. The system handles thousands of assets across multiple tenants with zero downtime. Exceptional engineering.
testimonial1.name: Marc D.

testimonial2.quote: They don't just write code. They understand the business problem. Our workflow automation saved us 20+ hours per week and paid for itself in the first month.
testimonial2.name: Sophie L.

testimonial3.quote: Finally, a dev team that speaks both technical and business language. The dashboard they built replaced three separate tools we were paying for.
testimonial3.name: Antoine R.

roiCalculator.title: What is manual work
roiCalculator.description: Estimate how much time and money your current setup is losing every month.
roiCalculator.disclaimer: Estimates based on industry averages. Actual results vary by project scope and execution.

metadata.title: Services: Full-Stack Web Development
metadata.description: Full-stack web development with Next.js, SQL databases, Supabase, and automation workflows. Real platforms, not templates. Systems, not pages.

hero.title: Services that
hero.description: From validation to deployment and beyond. Next.js applications with SQL databases, authentication, automation workflows, and scalable architecture. We build systems that power your business.

consulting.title: Strategic Consulting & Business Validation
consulting.subtitle: Clarity before code.
consulting.description: Before building anything, we validate your idea, analyze the market, and create a roadmap that makes sense. No wasted budget on features nobody needs.
consulting.whoFor: Founders with an idea who need clarity before investing in development.

development.title: Full-Stack Web Development
development.subtitle: Systems, not pages.
development.description: We build real digital platforms with frontend, backend, and database layers. Next.js applications powered by SQL, authentication, and automation workflows.
development.whoFor: Businesses that need real software, not a brochure website.
development.note: If it's only HTML/CSS, it's not our work.

ai.title: AI Tools & Custom GPT Integration
ai.subtitle: AI connected to your data.
ai.description: We build AI copilots that actually understand your business, connected to your database, trained on your data, integrated into your workflows.
features: AI copilots connected to your database
Internal assistants trained on your data
ai.whoFor: Teams ready to leverage AI for real productivity gains, not gimmicks.

support.title: Support & Workflow Automation
support.subtitle: We don't disappear after launch.
support.description: Continuous updates, monitoring, and improvements. Your technical partner for the long run, not a one-time vendor.
support.whoFor: Businesses that want a reliable tech partner, not a disappearing freelancer.

comparison.title: What makes us different
comparison.description: We focus on real engineering and long-term partnerships.

notSure.title: Not sure which service you need?
notSure.description: Book a free 30-minute consultation. We'll discuss your project and recommend the best approach.

cost.question: How much does a typical project cost?
cost.answer: It depends on scope. Consulting starts at €500, while a full SaaS platform can range from €5,000 to €25,000+. We provide detailed quotes after understanding your needs.

tech.question: What technologies do you work with?
tech.answer: Our primary stack is Next.js, React, and TypeScript. We also work with PHP, Node.js, and databases including PostgreSQL, MySQL, and MongoDB.

remote.question: Do you work with clients outside of France?
remote.answer: Yes. We work remotely across Europe and beyond. Communication via video calls, email, and your preferred tools.

takeover.question: Can you take over an existing project?
takeover.answer: Absolutely. We audit the current state, identify issues, and propose a plan to move forward.

metadata.title: About: Independent Engineering Practice
metadata.description: Deralis Digital is an independent engineering practice building real web platforms. SaaS applications, dashboards, automation workflows, and SQL-powered databases.

hero.title: About
hero.description: We build real web systems: platforms, dashboards, automation.

intro.paragraph1: Deralis Digital is an independent engineering practice focused on building real web platforms, not simple websites. We design and develop systems: SaaS applications, dashboards, automation workflows, and SQL-powered databases using modern technologies such as Next.js, React, TypeScript, Supabase, and Prisma.
intro.paragraph2: Our approach is engineering-first, built around clarity, performance, and long-term reliability. No WordPress. No templates. No drag-and-drop. Only real software.

philosophy.title: Our philosophy
philosophy.subtitle: Modern businesses don't need pages. They need systems.
systems: Integrate with existing tools and APIs
philosophy.conclusion: We build platforms that replace spreadsheets, manual processes, and outdated workflows with modern, stable, maintainable architecture.

whatWeBuild.title: What we build
whatWeBuild.description: We specialize in full-stack platform development.

dashboards.title: Admin Dashboards
dashboards.description: Data-driven tools with secure authentication and role-based access.

databases.title: Database Systems
databases.description: PostgreSQL / Supabase architectures, migrations, and schema design.

automation.title: Automation Workflows
automation.description: Integrations with APIs, webhooks, triggers, and automation tools.

api.title: API Integrations
api.description: Custom REST integrations, webhooks, OAuth, third-party systems.

whatWeBuild.note: Each platform we build is designed around clean engineering, not templates or pre-made components.

howWeWork.title: How we work
howWeWork.description: Clients work directly with the engineer behind Deralis Digital, without layers, outsourcing, or miscommunication. The process is simple and technical:

step1.title: Technical Discovery
step1.description: Understanding your system, workflows, and constraints.

step2.title: Architecture Design
step2.description: Database schema, API structure, core flows, security, scalability.

step3.title: Development
step3.description: Full-stack implementation using Next.js, React, TypeScript, Supabase.

step4.title: Testing & Deployment
step4.description: Staging, QA, production deployment, environment setup.

step5.title: Long-term Support
step5.description: Feature updates, monitoring, improvements, and scaling.

howWeWork.note: This workflow ensures stable delivery and reduces time-to-production.

techExpertise.title: Technology expertise
techExpertise.description: We use a modern, unified stack to keep development fast, predictable, and scalable.

screenshots.title: Real systems we've built
screenshots.description: Dashboards, workflows, and database systems used in production environments.

notes.note1: These systems include multi-tenant logic, role-based access, SQL databases, and automation workflows.
notes.note2: All platforms shown here are built with real databases, real logic, and real engineering, not templates.
notes.note3: This demonstrates our focus: systems, not pages.

whyChoose.title: Why businesses choose Deralis Digital

whyChoose.conclusion: Deralis Digital is built for founders, teams, and businesses that need real engineering, not web decoration.

hero.description: Practical thinking on operations, software, and what it actually takes to build systems that work.

why-profitable-businesses-run-on-manual-.title: Why Profitable Businesses Still Run on Manual Work in 2026, and What It Actually Costs Them
why-profitable-businesses-run-on-manual-.excerpt: Profitable SMEs still run on Excel, WhatsApp, and email in 2026. Here is what manual processes actually cost your business, and what fixing it really takes.

web-system-not-just-a-website.title: Why Your Business Needs a Web System, Not Just a Website
web-system-not-just-a-website.excerpt: A website shows people you exist. A web system makes your business run. Here is the difference, and how to know which one you actually need.

saas-vs-custom-build.title: SaaS vs Custom Build: How to Make the Right Choice
saas-vs-custom-build.excerpt: SaaS or custom build? An honest decision framework for founders tired of tools that almost work. No pitch, just the right questions to ask.

roi-workflow-automation-small-business.title: The Real ROI of Workflow Automation for Small Businesses
roi-workflow-automation-small-business.excerpt: What does workflow automation actually save a small business? Real numbers, honest framing, and a five-minute ROI method you can run yourself.

why-nextjs-production-apps.title: Why I Build Production Apps with Next.js
why-nextjs-production-apps.excerpt: Why Next.js for production apps in 2026? An honest technical take on performance, full-stack architecture, and when to choose something else.

ai-business-operations-honest-guide.title: 5 Ways AI Actually Improves Business Operations (and 3 Ways It Does Not)
ai-business-operations-honest-guide.excerpt: Five AI use cases that actually work for small business operations, and three that still fall short. Honest, specific, no hype.

metadata.title: Privacy Policy
metadata.description: Privacy Policy for Deralis Digital. How we collect, use, and protect your personal data.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Deralis Digital ("we", "our", "us") is an independent engineering practice providing web development and digital services. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal data when you visit deralis.digital or contact us.

voluntary.title: 1.1 Information you submit voluntarily
voluntary.intro: When you contact us through email or forms, we collect:
voluntary.note: This information is used solely to respond to your inquiry.

technical.title: 1.2 Technical data
technical.intro: When you browse our website, basic technical information may be collected automatically:
items: Date, time, and duration of visit
technical.note: This data is used for security, performance monitoring, and aggregated analytics.
technical.noTrackers: We do not use advertising trackers, third-party marketing cookies, or profiling tools.

howWeUse.title: 2. How we use your data
howWeUse.intro: Your data is used only for:
howWeUse.noSell: We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal data.

legalBasis.title: 3. Legal basis (GDPR)
legalBasis.intro: We process personal data based on:

items.legitimate: Legitimate interest: responding to inquiries, improving website performance
items.contract: Performance of a contract: when working together
items.consent: Consent: if you choose to provide information

storage.title: 4. Data storage and retention
storage.intro1: We store personal data securely in the EU or equivalent jurisdictions.
storage.intro2: Data is retained only as long as necessary:

items.project: Project information: duration of the project + legal obligations
items.analytics: Analytics logs: typically 30 to 90 days depending on provider

sharing.title: 5. Sharing your data
items: Tools required to deliver our services
sharing.compliance: These providers comply with GDPR or offer equivalent protections.
sharing.noMarketing: We do not share your information with third parties for marketing.

rights.title: 6. Your rights (EU & GDPR)
items: Request a copy of your data
rights.exercise: You may exercise these rights at:

cookies.title: 7. Cookies
cookies.noAds: We do not use advertising cookies or trackers.

contact.title: 8. Contact
contact.intro: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, contact:

metadata.title: Terms of Service
metadata.description: Terms of Service for Deralis Digital. Conditions for using our website and services.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms govern your use of the website deralis.digital and any services provided by Deralis Digital ("we", "our", "us"). By accessing our website or contacting us, you agree to these Terms.

websiteUse.title: 1. Use of the website
websiteUse.intro: You may browse this website for informational purposes. You agree not to:
items: Attempt to breach the website's security
Copy or reproduce content without permission
Misuse contact forms or attempt spam

services.title: 2. Services
services.note: A service relationship begins only after both parties agree in writing to a proposal or contract.

quotes.title: 3. Quotes & pricing
items: Are valid for 30 days unless stated otherwise
May change based on updated requirements
Are not binding until formally accepted

payment.title: 4. Payment terms
payment.intro: Specific payment terms are defined in each project contract. Unless otherwise stated:
items: Development projects may use milestone-based payments
Work begins after initial payment is received
payment.late: Late payments may result in suspension of services.

ip.title: 5. Intellectual property
items: We retain ownership of development tools, internal libraries, and frameworks we use.
The client receives full usage rights for all custom deliverables created specifically for their project.
Third-party libraries remain licensed under their respective terms.

confidentiality.title: 6. Confidentiality
confidentiality.content: All project information shared between you and Deralis Digital is confidential and will not be disclosed without consent, except when legally required.

liability.title: 7. Limitation of liability
liability.intro: Deralis Digital is not liable for:
items: Issues caused by third-party hosting providers, APIs, or services
liability.limit: Liability is limited to the amount paid for services in the preceding 3 months.

termination.title: 8. Termination
termination.content: Both parties may terminate a project contract with written notice if obligations are not met. Completed deliverables and pending payments remain due.

law.title: 9. Governing law
law.content: These Terms are governed by French law. Any dispute shall be handled by the competent courts in France.
